$comment: Seed corpus for the Coveo ML warm-up runner (seed-ml.ts in this folder).
Edit freely — every entry is one user session. Four independent buckets:
- querySuggestionSeeds : species/ability/type names typed char-by-char so the QS model captures them as queries AND can later suggest them.
- facetExerciseSeeds   : query + 1 facet toggle (and submit) per item. Trains facetSelect analytics and gives ART signal on filtered result lists.
- naturalLanguageRGASeeds : full-sentence questions submitted as a whole. Drives the RGA model's training/streaming endpoint and citation-click events.

- artClickSeeds        : {query, targetSlug} pairs — submit the query, find the card with /pokemon/<slug>, click it. Each click fires `documentClick` analytics, which is the ONLY direct training signal Automatic Relevance Tuning consumes. Repeat across loops so the same query→result pattern reinforces.
Keep them small and representative; quantity matters less than variety. The runner can repeat the full set with --loops N.
naturalLanguageRGASeeds: which Pokemon have the Levitate ability
list Fire type Pokemon from Generation 2
what are the abilities of Garchomp
which Poison types resist Ground attacks
